action.reasoning: Observation: iteration 21 eval failed because predict.py cannot load best_model_clip.pt — missing backbone keys (cls_token, pos_embed, etc.) despite stripping 'module.' prefix. Analysis: the checkpoint likely has a different internal structure (prefix mismatch). I'll inspect the checkpoint keys versus the model's expected keys, then fix predict.py to handle it. This will recover the baseline and allow TTA. Decision: run a short inspection script, then update predict.py with correct key mapping and resubmit eval. Thereafter train DINOv2.
